Empirical Project 1

Alex Bell

2025-01-31

Setup

library(readr)
library(Hmisc)
## 
## Attaching package: 'Hmisc'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     format.pval, units
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
## Loading required package: zoo
## 
## Attaching package: 'zoo'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     as.Date, as.Date.numeric
library(ggplot2)

atlas <- read_csv('/Users/alexbell/Downloads/atlas.csv')
## Rows: 73278 Columns: 62
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr  (1): czname
## dbl (61): tract, county, state, cz, hhinc_mean2000, mean_commutetime2000, fr...
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
attach(atlas)

creating subsets for state and county

ventura <- subset(atlas,state == 06 & county == 111)
cali <- subset(atlas,state == 06)

##25th percentiles for Tract, state, country

kfr_pooled_p25[state == 06 & county == 111 & tract == 007700]
## [1] 33029.82
wtd.mean(cali$kfr_pooled_p25, cali$count_pooled)
## [1] 35765.82
wtd.mean(atlas$kfr_pooled_p25, atlas$count_pooled)
## [1] 34311.68

##75th and 100th percentiles for Tract, state, country

kfr_pooled_p75[state == 06 & county == 111 & tract == 007700]
## [1] 46993.17
wtd.mean(cali$kfr_pooled_p75, cali$count_pooled)
## [1] 48995.07
wtd.mean(atlas$kfr_pooled_p75, atlas$count_pooled)
## [1] 51284.03
kfr_pooled_p100[state == 06 & county == 111 & tract == 007700]
## [1] 60721.27
wtd.mean(cali$kfr_pooled_p100, cali$count_pooled)
## [1] 62346.79
wtd.mean(atlas$kfr_pooled_p100, atlas$count_pooled)
## [1] 69218.15

##regressing 25th percentile and 75th percentile on each other

ventura$xvar <- ventura$kfr_pooled_p25
ventura$yvar <- ventura$kfr_pooled_p75

ventura$x_std <- (ventura$xvar - mean(ventura$xvar, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$xvar, na.rm=TRUE)
ventura$y_std <- (ventura$yvar - mean(ventura$yvar, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$yvar, na.rm=TRUE)


mod1 <- lm(y_std ~ x_std, data = ventura)
summary(mod1)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = y_std ~ x_std, data = ventura)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.1801 -0.3827  0.0758  0.4338  2.8001 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) -1.329e-17  5.471e-02    0.00        1    
## x_std        6.987e-01  5.487e-02   12.73   <2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.7175 on 170 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.4882, Adjusted R-squared:  0.4852 
## F-statistic: 162.1 on 1 and 170 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
coeftest(mod1, vcov = vcovHC(mod1, type="HC1"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                Estimate  Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) -1.3288e-17  5.4710e-02   0.000        1    
## x_std        6.9870e-01  6.7382e-02  10.369   <2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
ggplot(mod1, aes(x_std, y_std))+geom_point() + geom_smooth(color = 'red', method = "lm", se = FALSE)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

sorting results for each race

ventura$xvarasian <- ventura$kfr_asian_p25
ventura$yvarasian <- ventura$kfr_asian_p75

ventura$x_stdasian <- (ventura$xvarasian - mean(ventura$xvarasian, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$xvarasian, na.rm=TRUE)
ventura$y_stdasian <- (ventura$yvarasian - mean(ventura$yvarasian, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$yvarasian, na.rm=TRUE)


modasian <- lm(y_stdasian ~ x_stdasian, data = ventura)
summary(modasian)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = y_stdasian ~ x_stdasian, data = ventura)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -2.1320 -0.5416 -0.1078  0.5035  2.9012 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) -3.044e-16  8.708e-02   0.000        1    
## x_stdasian   4.515e-01  8.749e-02   5.161 1.19e-06 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.8965 on 104 degrees of freedom
##   (66 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2039, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1962 
## F-statistic: 26.63 on 1 and 104 DF,  p-value: 1.186e-06
coeftest(modasian, vcov = vcovHC(modasian, type="HC1"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                Estimate  Std. Error t value  Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) -3.0438e-16  8.7080e-02  0.0000         1    
## x_stdasian   4.5152e-01  8.7452e-02  5.1631 1.173e-06 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
ventura$xvarblack <- ventura$kfr_black_p25
ventura$yvarblack <- ventura$kfr_black_p75

ventura$x_stdblack <- (ventura$xvarblack - mean(ventura$xvarblack, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$xvarblack, na.rm=TRUE)
ventura$y_stdblack <- (ventura$yvarblack - mean(ventura$yvarblack, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$yvarblack, na.rm=TRUE)


modblack <- lm(y_stdblack ~ x_stdblack, data = ventura)
summary(modblack)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = y_stdblack ~ x_stdblack, data = ventura)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -2.1103 -0.6336 -0.1975  0.4916  3.1023 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)  2.259e-16  1.559e-01   0.000    1.000
## x_stdblack  -6.036e-02  1.578e-01  -0.382    0.704
## 
## Residual standard error: 1.011 on 40 degrees of freedom
##   (130 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.003644,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.02127 
## F-statistic: 0.1463 on 1 and 40 DF,  p-value: 0.7041
coeftest(modblack, vcov = vcovHC(modblack, type="HC1"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                Estimate  Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)  2.2587e-16  1.5594e-01  0.0000   1.0000
## x_stdblack  -6.0363e-02  1.4274e-01 -0.4229   0.6746
ventura$xvarwhite <- ventura$kfr_white_p25
ventura$yvarwhite <- ventura$kfr_white_p75

ventura$x_stdwhite <- (ventura$xvarwhite - mean(ventura$xvarwhite, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$xvarwhite, na.rm=TRUE)
ventura$y_stdwhite <- (ventura$yvarwhite - mean(ventura$yvarwhite, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$yvarwhite, na.rm=TRUE)


modwhite <- lm(y_stdwhite ~ x_stdwhite, data = ventura)
summary(modwhite)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = y_stdwhite ~ x_stdwhite, data = ventura)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.3782 -0.3315  0.1106  0.4205  6.6520 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) -5.234e-16  7.120e-02   0.000        1    
## x_stdwhite   3.851e-01  7.141e-02   5.393 2.34e-07 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.9256 on 167 degrees of freedom
##   (3 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1483, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1432 
## F-statistic: 29.08 on 1 and 167 DF,  p-value: 2.339e-07
coeftest(modwhite, vcov = vcovHC(modwhite, type="HC1"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                Estimate  Std. Error t value  Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) -5.2339e-16  7.1202e-02  0.0000         1    
## x_stdwhite   3.8511e-01  8.5627e-02  4.4976 1.282e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
ventura$xvarhisp <- ventura$kfr_hisp_p25
ventura$yvarhisp <- ventura$kfr_hisp_p75

ventura$x_stdhisp <- (ventura$xvarhisp - mean(ventura$xvarhisp, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$xvarhisp, na.rm=TRUE)
ventura$y_stdhisp <- (ventura$yvarhisp - mean(ventura$yvarhisp, na.rm=TRUE)) / sd(ventura$yvarhisp, na.rm=TRUE)


modhisp <- lm(y_stdhisp ~ x_stdhisp, data = ventura)
summary(modhisp)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = y_stdhisp ~ x_stdhisp, data = ventura)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.4402 -0.5142  0.0304  0.4838  3.7043 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) -2.257e-16  7.111e-02   0.000        1    
## x_stdhisp    4.069e-01  7.133e-02   5.705 5.31e-08 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.9162 on 164 degrees of freedom
##   (6 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1656, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1605 
## F-statistic: 32.54 on 1 and 164 DF,  p-value: 5.314e-08
coeftest(modhisp, vcov = vcovHC(modhisp, type="HC1"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                Estimate  Std. Error t value  Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) -2.2568e-16  7.1114e-02  0.0000         1    
## x_stdhisp    4.0692e-01  7.0476e-02  5.7738 3.785e-08 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

hypothesis testing

library(ggplot2)

## regression testing correlation between non-white share in each tract and mobility 
nwtest <- lm(ventura$y_std ~ ventura$nonwhite_share2010, data = ventura)
coeftest(nwtest, vcov = vcovHC(nwtest, type="HC1"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                            Estimate Std. Error t value  Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                 0.89589    0.15222  5.8856 2.061e-08 ***
## ventura$nonwhite_share2010 -1.83312    0.29265 -6.2639 2.974e-09 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
ggplot(nwtest, aes(ventura$nonwhite_share2010, ventura$y_std)) + geom_point(color = 'darkblue') + geom_smooth(color = 'red', method = "lm", se = FALSE)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

## calculating the 95% confidence interval
critical_value <- qt(0.95/2, df = nwtest$df.residual)

-1.83312 - critical_value * 0.29265
## [1] -1.814742
-1.83312 + critical_value * 0.29265
## [1] -1.851498
## regression testing correlation between employment rate in each tract and mobility 
emptest <- lm(ventura$y_std ~ ventura$emp2000, data = ventura)
coeftest(emptest, vcov = vcovHC(emptest, type="HC1"))
## 
## t test of coefficients:
## 
##                 Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)   
## (Intercept)     -1.71819    0.59366 -2.8943 0.004299 **
## ventura$emp2000  2.78777    0.95801  2.9100 0.004099 **
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
ggplot(emptest, aes(ventura$emp2000, ventura$y_std)) + geom_point(color = 'darkblue') + geom_smooth(color = 'darkgreen', method = "lm", se = FALSE)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

## calculating the 95% confidence interval
critical_value2 <- qt(0.95/2, df = emptest$df.residual)

2.78777 - critical_value2 * 0.95801
## [1] 2.847932
2.78777 + critical_value2 * 0.95801
## [1] 2.727608
